_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: there is a statistically significant reduction in VsEP amplitudes in Nf2 cKO mice. This effect is somewhat rescued in Nf2 cKO+ND1 mice
details: Statistically significant reduction in VsEP amplitudes in Nf2 cKO mice, with some rescue effect in Nf2 cKO+ND1 mice
